overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the Toussaint countryside. The character travels along a dirt path past stone walls and cypress trees toward a snow-capped mountain, then veers into a flower-filled meadow as the lighting shifts to golden hour near a lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road with stone walls and cypress trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt road toward the mountain

entered.detail: Large snow-capped mountain dominating the horizon with rocky peaks
Winding dirt path stretching ahead through the countryside
Low stone wall running alongside the right side of the road
Tall thin evergreen trees scattered along the roadside

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt road bordered by stone walls and cypress trees. The snow-capped mountain dominates the center view while the road stretches ahead through lush green countryside under bright afternoon sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside approaching a castle estate

events.description: road curves slightly right toward the castle visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the dirt road as the landscape opens up

entered.detail: Large stone castle with multiple towers visible on a distant hill
Low stone ruins or walls visible in the distant left field

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the dirt road, the stone walls give way to open fields. The castle palace becomes visible on the right while the mountain remains ahead, and the road curves gently toward the estate.

scene_state.functional_zone: wildflower meadow approaching a lakeshore at sunset

events.description: character leaves the dirt road and enters the tall grass meadow
lighting shifts to golden hour as the sun lowers behind the mountains creating strong backlight

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaves the road to walk through the wildflower meadow toward the lake

entered.detail: Tall grass with red and purple wildflowers covering the ground
Calm lake surface reflecting the golden sunlight
Tall thin rock spire rising from the lakeshore

segments.scene_description: Leaving the road behind, Geralt walks through a meadow filled with wildflowers. The lighting shifts to golden hour as he approaches a lake with a distinctive rock formation, while the castle remains visible on the right and the sun creates a warm backlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush countryside that transforms from a bright afternoon road into a golden-hour lakeside meadow. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt road bordered by stone walls and cypress trees, with a snow-capped mountain dominating the horizon under a bright sun. As the road curves, the stone walls give way to open fields and a distant castle palace emerges on the right. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the road behind to enter a meadow filled with wildflowers, while the lighting transitions into a warm golden hour. Finally, the movement leads toward a lake with a distinctive rock formation, with the sun creating a soft backlight against the backdrop of the estate.
